creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tobik
Date: Tue May  9 09:19:26 UTC 2017
New revision: 440476
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/440476

Log:
  Rename option PULSE to PULSEAUDIO

  Almost all other ports use PULSEAUDIO to enable PulseAudio support.  This
  makes it easier to enable support globally via OPTIONS_SET.

  PR:		219119
  Approved by:	lme (mentor), Christian Kraemer <uddka@student.kit.edu> (maintainer)
  Differential Revision:	https://reviews.freebsd.org/D10646

Changes:
  head/audio/sonic-visualiser/Makefile
